prose: Fukui condensed reactivity indices for nitrobenzene computed at the DFT level using tier 'standard' (B3LYP/def2-TZVP) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Partial charges via Mulliken scheme. The N−1 (cation) state used charge +1 / multiplicity 2; the N+1 (anion) state used charge −1 / multiplicity 2. No density fitting was applied (exact four-center integrals). All three SCF runs converged cleanly; integrity checks all passed (trustworthy: true). No warnings were reported. Headline value reported is the maximum f⁺ (most electrophilic site) = 0.49641781 at atom 4 (ipso carbon bearing the nitro group). Full per-atom f⁺, f⁻, f⁰, and dual descriptor table provided in the response above.
